calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Orange County Public Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Orange County Public Schools (OCPS) is Monday, August 11, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Orange County Public Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Orange County Public Schools is Wednesday, May 27, 2026 — the earliest finish among major Florida districts. Broward ends June 5 and Miami-Dade ends June 4.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Orange County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Orange County Public Schools runs March 16–20, 2026 — the same week as Broward, Palm Beach, and Hillsborough counties, but one week earlier than Miami-Dade (March 23–27). Orlando theme parks are busy during OCPS break week.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Orange County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Orange County Public Schools runs December 22, 2025–January 2, 2026 (12 days). A teacher workday falls on January 5, so students return Tuesday, January 6, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2025-2026 for Orange County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Orange County Public Schools runs November 24–28, 2025 (Monday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 27. School resumes Monday, December 1, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Earliest End
yearNumbers.detail: Orange County ends May 27 — the earliest finish among major Florida districts, with Broward ending June 5 and Miami-Dade ending June 4.

calendarNotes: Orange County Public Schools (Orlando) begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 11, 2025. Spring Break runs March 16–20, 2026 — the same week as Broward, Palm Beach, and Hillsborough counties, but one week earlier than Miami-Dade (March 23–27). The school year ends May 27, 2026.
